features.description: Create references/pyproject.toml with python-pptx, Pillow, mistune deps and run uv sync
features.acceptance: uv sync succeeds in references/ directory and uv.lock is generated

features.description: Create references/palettes.md with 12 palette definitions (hex values for bg, fg, accent, accent2, muted, highlight, error)
features.acceptance: File contains all 12 palettes with complete hex values and archetype mappings

features.description: Create references/slide-types.md with 9 slide type specs (title, section_header, content, diagram, diagram_full, metrics, two_column, comparison, closing)
features.acceptance: Each slide type has description, required/optional fields, layout positions in Inches, and typography specs

features.description: Create scripts/build_deck.py — JSON manifest to .pptx builder with 9 slide type renderers
features.acceptance: Run with a 3-slide test manifest (title + diagram + closing) and a test PNG; output .pptx opens with correct slides, dark palette, and embedded image

features.description: Create references/manifest-schema.md documenting the JSON manifest format with examples for each slide type
features.acceptance: Schema covers metadata block and all 9 slide type field definitions with examples

features.description: Create scripts/parse_report.py — markdown + images directory to JSON manifest using mistune 3.x
features.acceptance: Parse test markdown with 3 sections and 1 image ref; output JSON has correct slide types matching mapping rules

features.description: Create SKILL.md with YAML frontmatter, interview workflow, archetype selection, intent routing table, and scripts table
features.acceptance: SKILL.md has frontmatter (name, description, version), 7-step workflow, intent routing table, scripts table; follows mermaid-diagram pattern

features.description: Create references/archetypes.md with 12 archetype definitions and decision matrix
features.acceptance: Each archetype has: when to use, default slide sequence, recommended palette, layout style, slide count range; decision matrix maps goal x audience to archetypes

features.description: Create references/writing-style.md with technical writing guide for slide content
features.acceptance: Covers title rules, bullet rules, prose rules, caption rules, and anti-patterns list

features.description: Create references/design-principles.md with Anthropic's 10 design rules, typography table, and layout constraints
features.acceptance: All 10 rules documented, typography table has sizes/weights, layout constraints include margins and spacing

features.description: Create scripts/validate_deck.py — structural validation with optional LibreOffice visual validation
features.acceptance: Structural checks pass on test .pptx; graceful degradation when soffice absent; --json flag outputs structured report

features.description: End-to-end integration test: markdown → parse_report.py → build_deck.py → validate_deck.py
features.acceptance: Full pipeline runs without errors; output .pptx has correct slide count, palette colors, and embedded images

features.description: Create evals/trigger-eval.json (20 queries) and evals/implementation-eval.json (5 scenarios)
features.acceptance: Trigger eval has 10 should-trigger + 10 should-not; implementation eval has 5 scenarios with assertions
